title: E’n A Hun Lian Thei Lo

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa hong pai ding a hun lian kuamah’n thei lo,
Tua hun hong nai hi, ci-in limte’n
hong lakzo;
Hong pai kik ding hi cih kam ciamna thupha kho,
E’n a hun lian thei
lo.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hong pai ding kigingsa-in om ciat ni,
Hong pai ding, Hallelujah!
Hallelujah!
Pasian vangliatna tawh meii tung tuangin hong pai ding,
E’n a hun lian thei
lo.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hotkhiatna a zong mipil ta ding khuavak hi,
Topa thuhilhna Lai Siangtho sungah om
hi;
Hong hilhna thu in hun bei nading hong lak hi,
E’n a hun lian thei
lo.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Meivak tangsak in thungen kawmin i ngak ding,
Topa hong pai dong, ngakkawmin na i
sem ding;
Na lamdang pian sim hong naina thu phawk sem ding,
E’n a hun lian thei lo.
